since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.52%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.21% · BTC +2.26% · Gold +0.74% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.52%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.52%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -12.01%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.22%, APP +9.27%, META +8.61%, SNAP +7.21%, PLTR +6.88%. Laggards: KLAC -12.01%, TER -11.13%, MU -10.57%, LRCX -10.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.83% at $157.48
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
